overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long TSLA Daily ETF (TSLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Tesla stock, less fees, and expenses. TSLG was launched on Dec 13, 2024 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
